headline: Verizon lifts annual profit forecast after surprise rise in wireless subscribers
summary: Verizon raised its annual profit forecast on Monday after revamped customer offers and bundled plans drove surprise first-quarter ‌wireless subscriber additions.  With deals such as offering better terms to ‌customers who brought in bills from rivals like AT&T and T-Mobile, Verizon worked to draw ​in paying subscribers as part of a broader turnaround push to revive wireless growth.  Verizon added 55,000 monthly bill-paying wireless subscribers in the quarter, its first net gains for the March-ended period in more than a decade.

content.title: Verizon lifts annual profit forecast after surprise rise in wireless subscribers
content.summary: Verizon raised its annual profit forecast on Monday after revamped customer offers and bundled plans drove surprise first-quarter ‌wireless subscriber additions.  With deals such as offering better terms to ‌customers who brought in bills from rivals like AT&T and T-Mobile, Verizon worked to draw ​in paying subscribers as part of a broader turnaround push to revive wireless growth.  Verizon added 55,000 monthly bill-paying wireless subscribers in the quarter, its first net gains for the March-ended period in more than a decade.

headline: Keeper Security Introduces Verify Mode and New Browser Controls to Prevent Phishing and Credential Misuse
summary: Keeper Security, the leading zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security and Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform, today announces the release of Verify Mode, a new anti-phishing capability in version 17.8 of its browser extension. Verify Mode provides real-time validation of where credentials are being entered, helping prevent users from entering passwords into malicious or unrecognized websites.

content.title: Keeper Security Introduces Verify Mode and New Browser Controls to Prevent Phishing and Credential Misuse
content.summary: Keeper Security, the leading zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security and Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform, today announces the release of Verify Mode, a new anti-phishing capability in version 17.8 of its browser extension. Verify Mode provides real-time validation of where credentials are being entered, helping prevent users from entering passwords into malicious or unrecognized websites.

headline: Verizon (NYSE:VZ) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Telecommunications giant Verizon (NYSE:VZ) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 2.9% year on year to $34.44 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.28 per share was 5.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.summary: Telecommunications giant Verizon (NYSE:VZ) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 2.9% year on year to $34.44 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.28 per share was 5.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Stop Valuing CHTR Stock Like It Is Going Out Of Business
summary: Charter Communications (NASDAQ: CHTR) has experienced a multi-year decline, trading roughly 58% below its 52-week high. headline: Verizon Stock Jumps After Earnings. How Big Wireless Is Crushing Cable.
summary: Verizon Communications  stock was rising on Monday after the company’s strong first-quarter results showed that Big Wireless is beating cable in a brutal battle for subscribers.  Verizon reported adjusted earnings of $1.28 a share, as revenue rose 2.9% from a year ago to $34.4 billion.  Analysts were expecting earnings of $1.21 a share on revenue of $34.8 billion, according to a FactSet poll.

content.title: Verizon Stock Jumps After Earnings. How Big Wireless Is Crushing Cable.
content.summary: Verizon Communications  stock was rising on Monday after the company’s strong first-quarter results showed that Big Wireless is beating cable in a brutal battle for subscribers.  Verizon reported adjusted earnings of $1.28 a share, as revenue rose 2.9% from a year ago to $34.4 billion.  Analysts were expecting earnings of $1.21 a share on revenue of $34.8 billion, according to a FactSet poll.

headline: Verizon boosts annual profit forecast after surprise rise in wireless subscribers
summary: Verizon raised its annual profit forecast on Monday after revamped customer offers and bundled plans led to surprise ‌first-quarter wireless subscriber additions, sending its shares up 4%.  With deals such as ‌offering better terms to customers who brought in bills from rivals like AT&T and T-Mobile, Verizon worked ​to draw in paying subscribers as part of a broader turnaround push to revive wireless growth.  Verizon added 55,000 monthly bill-paying wireless subscribers in the quarter, its first net gains for the March-ended period in more than a decade.

content.title: Verizon boosts annual profit forecast after surprise rise in wireless subscribers
content.summary: Verizon raised its annual profit forecast on Monday after revamped customer offers and bundled plans led to surprise ‌first-quarter wireless subscriber additions, sending its shares up 4%.  With deals such as ‌offering better terms to customers who brought in bills from rivals like AT&T and T-Mobile, Verizon worked ​to draw in paying subscribers as part of a broader turnaround push to revive wireless growth.  Verizon added 55,000 monthly bill-paying wireless subscribers in the quarter, its first net gains for the March-ended period in more than a decade.
